/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/detail/ir_source_info__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/detail/state__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/detail/timed_switch__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cat_robot/src/ros2_ws/build/wiimote_msgs:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib: libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
